name: codex-toys-monorepo
description: Codex-native stdio agent, turn automation, SSH workspace operation, and generic HTTP proxy tools.

scripts.build: vp run --filter codex-toys build && vp run --filter codex-toys-docs build
scripts.check:types: vp run --concurrency-limit 1 --filter codex-toys --filter codex-toys-docs check:types && vp run -w docs:check
scripts.release:check: tsx scripts/check-publish-metadata.ts && vp run --filter codex-toys release:check
